articles.title: One of America's most dangerous fault lines reaches highest stress levels in 1,000 years, study finds - FOX Weather
articles.description: Just 50 miles from downtown Los Angeles, a critical junction where two of California's most powerful fault systems meet has been quietly accumulating stress levels matching 1,000-year highs, new research suggests.
